subcodes.first_line: Numerous Tablets have heretofore been dispatched by the hands of messengers, and the purpose thereof was that thou shouldst arise to serve the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الواح عدیده از قبل بایادی قاصدین ارسال شد و مقصود آنکه آنجناب بخدمت امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
